description: Ali Hadi Challenge #7 — a user runs a fake SysInternals installer that is actually a downloader; it edits the hosts file, pulls a payload, and installs a fake VMware service for persistence (built with Harlan Carvey). Single 7.2 GB E01.

expected_findings.note: Fake SysInternals installer / downloader execution. CURRENT GAP: engine flags benign OneDrive instead and misses this — see accuracy report false-positive section.
Fake VMware service installed for persistence.
hosts file modified to redirect/resolve payload host.
